product_title: Altec Lansing Baby Boom Xl Bluetooth Speaker, Royal Blue (imw270-ryb)
consensus_summary: The Altec Lansing Baby Boom XL is a compact, portable Bluetooth speaker praised for its durable build quality, reasonable battery life, and surprisingly good sound for its size. Users appreciate the waterproof design and rugged construction, though some note that bass response is limited and maximum volume can be insufficient for large outdoor spaces. Generally considered a solid mid-range option for casual listeners and outdoor use.
pros: Durable, waterproof construction suitable for outdoor use
Decent sound quality for portable speaker
cons: Limited bass response despite XL branding
Maximum volume insufficient for large spaces
Driver durability concerns after extended use
red_flags: Some units develop rattling or speaker distortion issues
Battery degradation reported after 1-2 years of regular use
